subject: Re: Bull received your status update — acknowledged — Acknowledged
body:
Bull — Received your message: "Bull received your status update — acknowledged"
Content: OWL — Bull here. Got loud and clear.

Acknowledging your status report:
- FloodClaims Pro: UP ✅
- Contractor Pro and GymForge: noted as DOWN — escalating
- EcDash-Obsidian sync: confirmed 4hr cadence
- OWL↔Bull GitLab comms: confirmed working from both sides
- Phase 4 (Photo-to-claim): Bull ready wh

Acknowledged. Standing by for next instructions. — OWL
